name: Higgsfield Supercomputer
summary: cloud-native agent for end-to-end media production — describe a reel, ad, product shot, or a week of content and it picks the right LLMs and image/video models, orchestrates 40+ built-in tools, and remembers your brand identity across campaigns; access via browser or Telegram with no local setup, paid tiers start at $15/mo

name: Codex in ChatGPT Mobile
summary: Codex lands in the ChatGPT mobile app on iOS and Android — kick off coding tasks, review diffs, redirect runs, and approve agent actions from your phone while Codex executes on a connected Mac; preview across all plans including free, with 4M+ weekly Codex users

name: Claude for Small Business
summary: packaged Claude for solopreneurs and small teams — prebuilt agentic workflows and one-click connectors into QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, DocuSign, Google Workspace, and Microsoft 365 to handle payroll, month-end close, invoice chasing, and campaign creation; bundled with a free AI fluency course

name: Claude Code Agent View + /goal
summary: Claude Code 2.1 ships a CLI dashboard for parallel sessions — `claude agents` opens one list of every running, blocked, or done agent; pair it with the new /goal command and Claude keeps iterating across turns until a completion condition is met; research preview on Pro, Max, Team, Enterprise, and API plans

name: HiDream-O1-Image
summary: open-source 8B pixel-native image model — single checkpoint handles text-to-image, image editing, and subject-driven personalization up to 2,048×2,048; MIT-licensed, debuted at #8 on the Artificial Analysis Text-to-Image Arena and is now the top open-weights image model

name: GPT-Realtime-2 + Voice API
summary: three voice models in the API — GPT-Realtime-2 brings GPT-5-class reasoning and 128K context to live speech-to-speech, GPT-Realtime-Translate covers 70 input / 13 output languages, GPT-Realtime-Whisper streams transcription; $32/M audio input, built for production voice agents

name: Claude Managed Agents: Dreaming + Outcomes
summary: three upgrades to Managed Agents at Code with Claude — Dreaming reviews past sessions overnight to extract patterns and curate memories, Outcomes lets you write a success rubric that an external grader scores against, and Multiagent Orchestration delegates subtasks to specialist agents on a shared filesystem

name: GPT-5.5 Instant
summary: ChatGPT's new default model — 52.5% fewer hallucinations, 30% shorter responses, and personalization from past chats, files, and connected Gmail; live for all ChatGPT users and as chat-latest in the API
